nodes.label: AI as personalized on-demand learning tool
nodes.grounding_span: I now find myself writing custom requests to Deep Research to write many on-demand, highly customized chapter-length summaries

nodes.label: AI reliability and thoroughness
nodes.grounding_span: Deep Research is also capable of providing worked software examples and tends to be the most reliable and thorough in terms of hallucinations, errors, and omissions

nodes.label: AI for internal/technical work
nodes.grounding_span: I try to have human-facing deliverables be handwritten

nodes.label: AI as iterative collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: I typically have a back-and-forth series of exchanges

nodes.label: AI as productivity multiplier for individuals
nodes.grounding_span: These tools are completely transformative to what is possible for ICs

nodes.label: Workplace acceptance of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: There is a strong bias against LLM-generated work

nodes.label: Efficient and tailored learning
nodes.grounding_span: I most value this tailored approach

nodes.label: Professional credibility and trust
nodes.grounding_span: I deeply regret admitting that I used certain tools in certain circumstances

nodes.label: Productivity and rapid delivery
nodes.grounding_span: I prototyped, designed, deployed and demo'd a 50K line solution

nodes.label: Career growth and skill expansion
nodes.grounding_span: AI tooling is also accelerating the speed of my learning

nodes.label: Enthusiasm for AI as personalized learning tool
Satisfaction with AI reliability in research
nodes.grounding_span: Deep Research is also capable of providing worked software examples and tends to be the most reliable and thorough

nodes.label: Preference for human writing in external deliverables
nodes.grounding_span: I try to have human-facing deliverables be handwritten

nodes.label: Frustration with iterative refinement needed
nodes.grounding_span: It is very rare, even with the first-in-class models from each vendor, that any LLM gets anything correct on the first attempt

nodes.label: Regret over transparency about AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I deeply regret admitting that I used certain tools in certain circumstances

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I suspect we're still in a very early inning in terms of how we work with these tools

nodes.label: Tailored request formulation — specifies level, length, and goal
nodes.grounding_span: you can specify where your current understanding and level is in the field, and ask for the composition of a research artifact that is meant to accomplish a specific goal

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — breaks tasks into smaller pieces and refines
nodes.grounding_span: I ask for something, review and refine it, ask for the next change, and iterate
